message:
test(engine): expand integration test suites and add new test files

New integration test files (5):
- claim_publication_gate_integration.rs
- lowering_gap_inventory_integration.rs
- parser_gap_inventory_integration.rs
- zero_placeholder_scan.rs
- ts_module_resolution_integration.rs

Expanded existing tests with additional cases:
- tier_up_profiler_integration (+202 lines)
- claim_entitlement (+261 lines)
- rgc_v8_supremacy_claim_contract (+66 lines)
- seqlock_candidate_inventory (+40 lines)
- Formatting fixes across 25 integration test files
